---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in DashLook
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: itrabbi24
---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Open File Explorer
2. Select a file with extension `...`
3. Press Space
4. See error

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened.

## Environment
- Windows version: (e.g. Windows 11 23H2)
- DashLook version: (e.g. v1.0.0)
- File type: (e.g. .png, .pdf)

## Screenshots / logs
If applicable, attach screenshots or paste logs from `%APPDATA%\DashLook\logs\`.
